description_long: This trash bin features a rectangular, vertical design with a sturdy black metal frame and wood-textured vertical slats on all four sides, giving it a modern yet natural appearance. The top is covered by a slightly arched, matte black metal lid that provides partial shelter to the open receptacle beneath, helping to keep rain out while allowing easy disposal of waste. The front panel includes a small, square black plate and a round knob or lock, suggesting a door for maintenance access. The bin's open-top design makes it suitable for high-traffic urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas. The materials and construction indicate durability and resistance to outdoor conditions. The overall look is clean, functional, and designed to blend with both urban and landscaped settings.
description: A rectangular trash bin with a black metal frame, wood-textured slats, and an arched black metal lid. The front features a small access door with a square plate and round knob.
description_view_0: Front view showing the access door with a square black plate and round knob beneath the arched lid.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood-textured slats and the arched black lid, with no visible access door or knob.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the side, showing only the wood-textured slats and the lid, with no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with wood-textured slats and the arched lid, no access door.
attribute_handle_design: round knob on front door, no external handles
attribute_labeling_or_signage: small black square plate on front, otherwise unmarked
